name: ASUS Prime B760M-K-CSM, Intel® B760 LGA 1700 mATX motherboard PCIe 4.0, two PCIe 4.0 M.2 slots, DDR5, Realtek 2.5Gb Ethernet, VGA, HDMI, SATA 6 Gbps, USB 3.2 Gen 1, Aura Sync
shortName: ASUS Prime B760M-K-CSM, Intel® B760 LGA 1700 mATX motherboard PCIe
description: ASUS Prime B760M-K-CSM is a compact mATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with DDR5 and PCIe 4.0 storage support.
